semantics.workingRule: Roles define reusable mandates; agents, runtimes, or operators fill positions that instantiate those roles.
semantics.linkingRule: Link wrkstrm-finance positions and assignments to role definitions rather than copying role mandates into agents.

finance-broker-adapter-steward.title: Wrkstrm Finance Broker Adapter Steward
finance-broker-adapter-steward.summary: Stewardship seat for wrkstrm-finance broker and market adapters, schema inventory, link rules, and anomaly hooks.

exit-whisper.title: Wrkstrm Finance Exit Whisper
exit-whisper.summary: Role mandate for wrkstrm-finance exit guidance, profit capture rules, trailing stops, simulation, and governed broker hooks.

market-summarizer.title: Wrkstrm Finance Market Summarizer
market-summarizer.summary: Role mandate for wrkstrm-finance daily market summaries, sector and IV analytics, governance exports, and summary delivery operations.

strategy-auditor.title: Wrkstrm Finance Strategy Auditor
strategy-auditor.summary: Role mandate for wrkstrm-finance risk audits, exposure dashboards, drift detection, and governance exception feeds.

swift-public-libraries-steward.title: Wrkstrm Finance Public Library Steward
swift-public-libraries-steward.summary: Stewardship seat for wrkstrm-finance public Swift libraries, broker service boundaries, DocC, tests, and source compatibility.

trade-journaler.title: Wrkstrm Finance Trade Journaler
trade-journaler.summary: Role mandate for wrkstrm-finance execution capture, entity-aware journaling, Notion synchronization, reconciliation, and audit packs.
